name: gumloop

metadata.name: gumloop
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python client for the Gumloop API

documentation:
# Gumloop Python Client

A Python client for the Gumloop API that makes it easy to run and monitor Gumloop flows.

## Installation

```bash
pip install gumloop
```

## Usage

```python
from gumloop import GumloopClient

# Initialize the client
client = GumloopClient(
    api_key="your_api_key",
    user_id="your_user_id"
)

# Run a flow and wait for outputs
output = client.run_flow(
    flow_id="your_flow_id",
    inputs={
        "recipient": "example@email.com",
        "subject": "Hello",
        "body": "World"
    }
)

print(output)
```

methods.name: gumloop.client.GumloopClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize Gumloop client.

Args:
    api_key: Your Gumloop API key
    user_id: Your Gumloop user ID
    project_id: Optional project ID for running automations under a workspace

methods.name: gumloop.client.GumloopClient.run_flow
documentation:
Run a Gumloop flow and wait for results.

Args:
    flow_id: The id of your flow
    inputs: Dictionary of input names to values
    poll_interval: How often to check for completion (seconds)
    timeout: Maximum time to wait for completion (seconds)
    
Returns:
    Dict containing the flow outputs
    
Raises:
    TimeoutError: If the flow doesn't complete within timeout
    RuntimeError: If the flow fails

methods.name: gumloop.client.GumloopClient.get_run_status
documentation:
Get the status of a flow run.

Args:
    run_id: The ID of the flow run
    
Returns:
    Dict containing run status information
